builders.subgoal: Implement renderer.js exposing window.renderer.render(latex, target) using KaTeX. Return {ok:true} on success or {ok:false, message} on failure. Empty/whitespace input returns {ok:true} with target cleared.

verification_summary: Builder produced renderer.js. Single public render function with the contracted signature. No exception escapes. Empty/whitespace short-circuit. displayMode:true. S1.A4 (CDN tags) is satisfied by section-4 page shell.
